title: Pharmacy Services Program Educational Objectives
content:
Pharmacy Services Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

The aim of this programme is to educate a pharmacy technician who would work under the supervision of a pharmacist in charge for assistance in dispensing the prescription drugs and other health care products to the patient.
